name: ai-native-webview-platform-control
description: Control and micro-test the Native AI Webapp Platform from Codex through MCP.

interface.shortDescription: Launch hosts, install generated apps, and run micro-tests.
interface.longDescription: Developer-only plugin for controlling the native WebView platform, validating generated app packages, inspecting bridge/core/runtime state, and running granular micro-tests through MCP.
defaultPrompt: Use @platform-micro-test to run the example webapp suite on the reference host.
Use @generated-webapp-repair to install a generated package, run micro-tests, and repair failures.
Use @core-replay-debug to replay the latest core event log and find the mismatch.
